coach_notes: For the Business Executive Assistant and Administrative Assistant roles, 'multitasking' and 'timemanagement' are critical gaps, as these jobs require juggling multiple tasks and deadlines. For the Quality Control Specialist position, 'dataentry' and 'inventorymanagement' are essential for tracking quality metrics and supplies. Prioritize developing multitasking and data entry skills to align with these specific job demands.

jobs.title: Administrative Assistant
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Administrative tasks match your organizational, communication, and Gmail/sheets skills. Classroom setting experience shows ability to manage multiple tasks.
jobs.gaps: No experience with specific administrative software or corporate office procedures. May need to learn company-specific tools.

jobs.title: Quality Control Specialist
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Your organizational and attention-to-detail skills from project and classroom settings could support quality control tasks.
jobs.gaps: No experience in quality control processes, technical inspection, or industry-specific standards. Missing relevant technical skills.

jobs.title: Business Executive Assistant (Remote, Full Time)
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Strong communication, organizational, and social engagement skills align with executive support. Experience as a point of contact and with Gmail/sheets is relevant.
jobs.gaps: No direct executive assistant experience. May need to develop calendar management, travel coordination, and remote work best practices.

jobs.title: Services Coordinator & Bookkeeping $18-$20 per hour (DOE)
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Organizational and communication skills are key for coordination. Social engagement and teamwork show ability to work with clients and teams.
jobs.gaps: No bookkeeping experience or knowledge of accounting software. Need to develop financial record-keeping skills.

jobs.title: Operations Associate
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Project management, organizational skills, and teamwork are relevant. Experience with sheets and social media shows data handling and digital literacy.
jobs.gaps: No direct operations experience. May need to learn supply chain, logistics, or operational processes specific to the company.
